changes.summary: Removed PERMISSION_GATES_PORT injection; inlined inv-05 post-type vote gates (event/project) and inv-19 ENABLE_COMMENT_VOTING from former adapter/permissions-helper behavior. Engine no longer delegates product gates to infrastructure.
Deleted V-11 zone-7 bridge adapter after signed OD-3; sole infrastructure→api-v1 permissions-helper import removed.
Zone 7 except array emptied; message updated to forbid all infrastructure→api-v1 imports (V-11 waiver retired).

notes: Attempt 1 confirms attempt-0 delta: no further write_set edits required. PermissionGatesPort token and EvaluateResourcePermissionsUseCase deps unchanged outside write_set; follow-up should bind PERMISSION_GATES_PORT to PermissionRuleEngine (or drop token) in Nest modules. permissions-helper retains full ResourcePermissions paths until routers adopt evaluate-resource-permissions UC.
